# viettelidc_vdbs_subnet_group (Data Source)

Look up an existing ViettelIDC VDBS Subnet Group by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tra cá»©u Subnet Group
data "viettelidc_vdbs_subnet_group" "db_sng" {
  name = "Dbs-Subnet-5e86a79e"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Subnet group ID.
- `name` (String) Subnet group name.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID the subnet group belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `subnet_ids` (List of String) List of subnet IDs in the group.
